title: GSC Performance Decline Diagnosis

symptoms.impressions: 499→368 API (7-day), declining trend confirmed in UI

diagnosis.evidence: New site impressions typically peak then normalize. QFINHUB launched ~2 months ago. Peak ~436 UI impressions. Now settling to 300-400.
1,991→526 drop. Google stopped discovering low-value parameterized pages. Fewer pages in discovery = fewer ranking opportunities.
diagnosis.impact: MEDIUM — net positive (better quality over quantity)

diagnosis.factor: Thin pages ranking instead of real pages
diagnosis.evidence: 24 of 34 near-winner pages (pos 1-30) are thin /tools/ and /scenario/ dupes. Google ranks them but they have 0 clicks.
diagnosis.impact: HIGH — real content pages buried behind thin dupes

diagnosis.evidence: 20 outreach sent, 0 replies. 0 backlinks. Google uses backlinks as trust signal.
CTR fixes deployed Jun 9 (3 days ago). Title/meta changes on 5+ pages. Google may not have recrawled yet.
diagnosis.impact: MEDIUM — temporary, should improve in 3-10 days

recommendation: Do NOT panic-change strategy. Continue Phase 20 first-click sprint. CTR fixes need more time. Indexing improvements are happening. The 1 click in 28d proves clicks ARE possible.
